trans-unit.source: Could not attach this AppHost to the running Aspire Deck.
trans-unit.target: Could not attach this AppHost to the running Aspire Deck.

trans-unit.source: Attached '{0}' to the running Aspire Deck (preview). Switch AppHosts from the Deck top bar.
trans-unit.target: Attached '{0}' to the running Aspire Deck (preview). Switch AppHosts from the Deck top bar.

trans-unit.source: Could not find the Aspire Deck executable. Build it under src/Aspire.Deck and set ASPIRE_DECK_PATH or pass --deck-path.
trans-unit.target: Could not find the Aspire Deck executable. Build it under src/Aspire.Deck and set ASPIRE_DECK_PATH or pass --deck-path.

trans-unit.source: Aspire Deck exited with error code {0}.
trans-unit.target: Aspire Deck exited with error code {0}.

trans-unit.source: The path to the Aspire Deck executable. Defaults to the ASPIRE_DECK_PATH environment variable or a local build.
trans-unit.target: The path to the Aspire Deck executable. Defaults to the ASPIRE_DECK_PATH environment variable or a local build.

trans-unit.source: Start Aspire Deck, a preview native dashboard.
trans-unit.target: Start Aspire Deck, a preview native dashboard.

trans-unit.source: The URL the OTLP gRPC endpoint listens on for telemetry ingestion.
trans-unit.target: The URL the OTLP gRPC endpoint listens on for telemetry ingestion.

trans-unit.source: The URL the OTLP HTTP endpoint listens on for telemetry ingestion.
trans-unit.target: The URL the OTLP HTTP endpoint listens on for telemetry ingestion.

trans-unit.source: The URL of the AppHost resource service to connect to.
trans-unit.target: The URL of the AppHost resource service to connect to.
